ksa_text: Knowledge of reference data management principles, including reference data taxonomy design, governance of controlled vocabularies, change management for reference data updates, and maintaining consistency across reference datasets.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of collection systems, capabilities, and processes.

nice.top_element_label: Identify the types of information to be processed, stored, or transmitted by a system

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-010 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4256 is insufficient to establish relevance to performance metrics, KPI analysis, and operational reporting at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.426, dcwf=0.425, onet=0.414) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4256 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does DQ-domain KSA DQ-K-010 (composite 0.4256) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4256 for DQ domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Performance Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms DQ domain KSA at composite 0.4256 is not a standard requirement for Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4256, domain DQ, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
